message: Node started: 1) Core text: The investigator wanted to interview the witness in person but he was too late. On his way, he got stuck in traffic. 2) Entities and roles: The investigator (subject/actor) and the witness (object/potential subject). 3) Linguistic phenomenon: Pronoun disambiguation and ambiguity detection regarding the pronouns he and his. 4) Specific question: Identify which option correctly explains the antecedent of the pronouns in the context of the provided narrative. The task is to determine if the pronouns refer to the investigator or the witness based on semantic and syntactic cues.
